infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Prayer Journal records spoken prayers, transcribes them into private journal entries and saves audio when you choose.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow location access to map your Prayer Walk route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow background location so Prayer Walk can keep tracking while your phone is locked.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Prayer Journal reads step count and walking/running distance from Apple Health during Prayer Walk to show your walk summary.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Prayer Journal writes Prayer Walk workouts, including duration, distance, and route, to Apple Health so your walks appear in Health and Fitness.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Prayer Journal uses Motion & Fitness to count steps during Prayer Walk and show a walk summary, for example total steps and distance.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Prayer Journal uses the camera to capture photos of handwritten prayers and attach them to your journal entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Prayer Journal uses your photo library so you can select existing photos to attach to your journal entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Prayer Journal can save images you create in the app, such as prayer walk route snapshots, to your photo library when you choose.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Prayer Journal reads step count and walking/running distance from Apple Health during Prayer Walk to show your walk summary.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Prayer Journal writes Prayer Walk workouts, including duration, distance, and route, to Apple Health so your walks appear in Health and Fitness.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your microphone to record and transcribe your spoken prayers
